case_title: JIM DONAHUE VS. STEPHAN SANTA MARIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1.00 FILED BY DONAHUE, JIM AS TO DEFENDANT SANTA MARIA, STEPHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONAHUE, JIM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JIM DONAHUE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEPHAN SANTA MARIA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 5/26/22. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO STEPHAN SANTA MARIA-NO SUCH NUMBER/UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONAHUE, JIM
